violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at 50ppm chlorine.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found with 50ppm chlorine solution. *Should be maintained at 100ppm Chlorine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost build up at interior surfaces of combo refrigerator, mainly at freezer compartment.
General premises. — --Screens loose around door and missing above flat top.
